  "sql": "SELECT\n  SUM(dly.tot_sls_amt) AS dly_sls_agg_total,\n  SUM(CASE WHEN oh.sts_cd <> 'X' THEN oh.tot_amt ELSE 0 END) AS ord_hdr_non_cancelled_total,\n  SUM(dly.tot_sls_amt) - SUM(CASE WHEN oh.sts_cd <> 'X' THEN oh.tot_amt ELSE 0 END) AS reconciliation_difference\nFROM main.dly_sls_agg dly\nFULL OUTER JOIN main.ord_hdr oh ON dly.agg_dt_key = oh.date_key AND dly.store_id = oh.store_id\nWHERE oh.sts_cd <> 'X' OR oh.sts_cd IS NULL;",
